steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
The passage establishes that a 2D photograph cannot capture how a building interacts with its surroundings—whether it complements, blends with, or clashes with nearby sights and activities.

The word thus signals that the next statement must logically conclude from this limitation.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer
steps.content:
B completes the logical chain: if a photograph cannot capture the building's interaction with surroundings, then it fails to convey the full impact of the building's design and structure.

The other three choices are unconnected to this point—A and D introduce topics not mentioned (historical importance and material deterioration), while C overstates the problem by saying the image misrepresents rather than simply fails to show the interaction.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
